## JMC Sample Script - representative real-world usage

## Basic aliases
#alias {k} {kill %1}
#alias {h} {#if {$j_hp < 50} {flee} {kill %1}}
#alias {n} {north}
#alias {s} {south}
#alias {e} {east}
#alias {w} {west}

## Variables
#variable {hp} {100}
#variable {maxhp} {100}
#variable {mana} {50}
#variable {gold} {0}

## Math
#math {hp} {$hp - 10}
#math {gold} {$gold + $reward}

## Actions
#action {^%0 arrives from the %1.} {#showme {*** %1 arrived from %2}}
#action {^You are dead!} {#showme {YOU DIED!}}
#action {^%0 hits YOU for %1 damage.} {#math {hp} {$hp - %2}}

## HP bar trigger
#action {^<HP:%0/%1>} {#variable {hp} {%1}; #variable {maxhp} {%2}}

## Conditional logic
#if {$hp < 20} {flee}
#if {$gold > 1000} {#showme {You are rich!}} {#showme {Keep grinding.}}

## Groups
#group enable combat
#alias {atk} {kill %1}
#action {^You engage %0.} {#showme {In combat with %1}}
#group disable combat

## Highlights
#highlight {bold} {You hit}
#highlight {red} {You are hit}
#highlight {light green} {You gain}
#highlight {yellow} {arrives from}

## Gag
#gag {You feel slightly drowsy.}
#gag {The door is already open.}

## Substitutions
#substitute {Orc} {ork}
#antisubstitute {safe zone}

## Hotkeys
#hotkey {F1} {north}
#hotkey {F2} {south}
#hotkey {F3} {east}
#hotkey {F4} {west}
#hotkey {Ctrl+H} {#showme {HP: $hp/$maxhp  Gold: $gold}}

## Ticker
#ticksize 60
#tickon

## Loop example
#loop {1,3} {#showme {Count: %0}}

## String manipulation
#tolower {name_lower} {%1}
#toupper {name_upper} {%1}

## Display
#showme {Script loaded successfully.}
#output {Welcome to the MUD!}

## Logging
#log {session.log} {append}

## Tab completion
#tabadd {goblin}
#tabadd {orc}
#tabadd {troll}

## Misc
#speedwalk on
#verbatim off
#echo on

## Comments using double hash
## End of script
